name: Standing Calf Raise
instructions: Stand upright with your feet flat on the floor, hip-width apart. You may hold a wall or sturdy surface lightly for balance if needed. This will be your starting position.
Raise your heels as high as possible by pressing through the balls of your feet, contracting your calf muscles at the top of the movement.
Hold the peak contraction for a moment, then slowly lower your heels back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended number of repetitions. To increase the range of motion, perform the exercise with the balls of your feet on the edge of a step.
